SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
select 
  ent.NPI
 ,hn.lastName
 ,hn.firstName
 ,hn.middleName
 ,org.orgName
 ,ent.entityTypeDescription
 ,hash(concat(
  ifnull(ent.NPI,''),'|'
 ,ifnull(hn.lastName,''),'|'
 ,ifnull(hn.firstName,''),'|'
 ,ifnull(hn.middleName,''),'|'
 ,ifnull(org.orgName,''),'|'
 ,ifnull(ent.entityTypeDescription,''),'|'
 )) as hashkey
from 
 (select 
  NPI
 ,case when EntityType = '1' then 'Individual' when EntityType = '2' then 'Organization' end as entityTypeDescription
 from carePreciseEntity 
 where FILE_ID =(select max(cast(FILE_ID as int)) from carePreciseEntity)
 )ent 
INNER JOIN 
 (select 
  NPI
 ,LN as lastName
 ,FN as firstName
 ,MN as middleName
 from carePreciseHumanNames
 where FILE_ID = (select max(cast(FILE_ID as int)) from carePreciseHumanNames)
 )hn on ent.NPI = hn.NPI
LEFT JOIN 
 (select 
  NPI
 ,OrgName_LBN as orgName
 from carePreciseOrgNames
 where FILE_ID = (select max(cast(FILE_ID as int)) from carePreciseOrgNames)
 )org on ent.NPI = org.NPI
SubLayerProcessing.DupScript:
select 1
from tempSQLScript
group by NPI
having count(*) > 1
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING 
(
 SELECT
  CASE WHEN ss.NPI IS NULL THEN dt.NPI else ss.NPI END as NPI
 ,ss.lastName
 ,ss.firstName
 ,ss.middleName
 ,ss.orgName
 ,ss.entityTypeDescription
 ,ss.hashkey
 ,CASE WHEN ss.NPI IS NULL THEN 'delete' END as flag
 FROM tempSQLScript ss
   FULL OUTER JOIN  DestinationTable dt
   ON ss.NPI = dt.NPI
) s
ON s.NPI = t.NPI
WHEN MATCHED AND s.flag='delete' THEN DELETE
WHEN MATCHED AND s.flag IS NULL AND s.hashkey<>t.hashkey THEN UPDATE
  SET  t.lastName=s.lastName,
       t.firstName=s.firstName,
       t.middleName=s.middleName,
       t.orgName=s.orgName,
       t.entityTypeDescription=s.entityTypeDescription,
       t.hashkey=s.hashkey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
  NPI
 ,lastName
 ,firstName
 ,middleName
 ,orgName
 ,entityTypeDescription
 ,hashkey
) 
VALUES (
  s.NPI
 ,s.lastName
 ,s.firstName
 ,s.middleName
 ,s.orgName
 ,s.entityTypeDescription
 ,s.hashkey
 )
